title: 1982 Men's Hockey Champions Trophy

infobox.value: [Netherlands](/wiki/Netherlands_men%27s_national_field_hockey_team "Netherlands men's national field hockey team") (2nd title)

[Australia](/wiki/Australia_men%27s_national_field_hockey_team "Australia men's national field hockey team") [Craig Davies](/wiki/Craig_Davies_(field_hockey) "Craig Davies (field hockey)") [Netherlands](/wiki/Netherlands_men%27s_national_field_hockey_team "Netherlands men's national field hockey team") [Ties Kruize](/wiki/Ties_Kruize "Ties Kruize") (9 goals)
Team | Pld | W | D | L | GF | GA | GD | Pts
[Netherlands](/wiki/Netherlands_men%27s_national_field_hockey_team "Netherlands men's national field hockey team") (C, H) | 5 | 4 | 1 | 0 | 21 | 10 | +11 | 9
[Soviet Union](/wiki/Soviet_Union_men%27s_national_field_hockey_team "Soviet Union men's national field hockey team") | 5 | 0 | 0 | 5 | 6 | 17 | −11 | 0

was the 4th edition of the [Hockey Champions Trophy](/wiki/Hockey_Champions_Trophy "Hockey Champions Trophy"), an international men's [field hockey](/wiki/Field_hockey "Field hockey") tournament. It took place from 6 June to 13 June in [Amstelveen](/wiki/Amstelveen "Amstelveen"), Netherlands. The [Netherlands](/wiki/Netherlands_men%27s_national_field_hockey_team "Netherlands men's national field hockey team") won the tournament for the second time in a row by finishing first in the [round-robin tournament](/wiki/Round-robin_tournament "Round-robin tournament").

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

1982 Men's Hockey Champions Trophy

| Dates | 6–13 June |

| Venue | [Wagener Stadium](/wiki/Wagener_Stadium "Wagener Stadium") |
| Final positions | |
| Champions | [Netherlands](/wiki/Netherlands_men%27s_national_field_hockey_team "Netherlands men's national field hockey team") (2nd title) |

| Goals scored | 94 (6.27 per match) |
| Top scorer(s) | [Australia](/wiki/Australia_men%27s_national_field_hockey_team "Australia men's national field hockey team") [Craig Davies](/wiki/Craig_Davies_(field_hockey) "Craig Davies (field hockey)") [Netherlands](/wiki/Netherlands_men%27s_national_field_hockey_team "Netherlands men's national field hockey team") [Ties Kruize](/wiki/Ties_Kruize "Ties Kruize") (9 goals) |
| |  |  | | --- | --- | | ← [1981](/wiki/1981_Men%27s_Hockey_Champions_Trophy "1981 Men's Hockey Champions Trophy") (previous) | (next) [1983](/wiki/1983_Men%27s_Hockey_Champions_Trophy "1983 Men's Hockey Champions Trophy") → | | |

The **1982 Men's Hockey Champions Trophy** was the 4th edition of the [Hockey Champions Trophy](/wiki/Hockey_Champions_Trophy "Hockey Champions Trophy"), an international men's [field hockey](/wiki/Field_hockey "Field hockey") tournament. It took place from 6 June to 13 June in [Amstelveen](/wiki/Amstelveen "Amstelveen"), Netherlands. The [Netherlands](/wiki/Netherlands_men%27s_national_field_hockey_team "Netherlands men's national field hockey team") won the tournament for the second time in a row by finishing first in the [round-robin tournament](/wiki/Round-robin_tournament "Round-robin tournament").
